_publications._publicationTitle: Gene signature associated with benign neurofibroma transformation to malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: The edgeR.logFC and edgeR.adj.pval (<0.1) values obtained for MPNST vs. NF...showed 428, 594 and 9 differentially methylated gene promoters, respectively
details: Successfully identified 428 differentially methylated gene promoters in MPNST vs. NF comparison, 594 in MPNST vs. control, and 9 in NF vs. control with edgeR.adj.pval <0.1
